About Wendy

Strategic. Compassionate.
Experienced.

Wendy McLarty is a licensed social worker turned HR executive bringing a rare combination of psychological insight and business acumen to her coaching. With over 16 years in social services and 12 years in HR leadership, she combines strategy with genuine compassion.

A wife, mother of three, and proud grandmother, she brings authenticity and hard-won wisdom to every coaching relationship.

Client Story
"I have known Wendy in both a professional and personal nature for many years. She has offered her wisdom and thoughtful suggestions to help me navigate life's challenges. She has a rare ability to help you maximize your potential while sorting out your priorities. I can highly recommend Wendy as a life coach."

About

Hi, I'm Wendy —
People Person.

A licensed social worker, HR executive, and life coach with 16+ years helping people and organizations thrive.

My Story

Blending strategy
with compassion

Wendy McLarty is a licensed social worker turned HR executive serving as Vice President of Human Resources — bringing a rare combination of psychological insight and business acumen to organizational leadership.

With over 16 years in social services and 12 years in HR management, she has established herself as a distinctive voice in workplace culture transformation — particularly as a female executive in male-dominated industries.

She specializes in Leadership Training, Workplace Culture Development, Team Building, Crisis Management, and Employee Wellness Programs.

A wife, mother of three, and grandmother, she brings authentic understanding of what it means to balance professional ambition with personal growth.

16+
Years in Social Work
12+
Years in HR
VP
Human Resources
Beyond the Office

Life outside
the boardroom

Outside her professional life, Wendy is a devoted wife, mother of three, and grandmother who believes balance is the foundation of great leadership. Her commitment to work-life integration isn't just advice — it's how she lives.

She loves self-help books, camping, boating, traveling, and soaking up the summer sun with her family — passions that fuel the vibrant, optimistic energy she brings to every coaching relationship.

What Clients Say
"I think we all can agree that life is filled with challenges. We often wish for someone who could listen and offer skilled guidance on how to make the most of this short life we have. I have known Wendy in both a professional and personal nature for many years. She has offered her wisdom and thoughtful suggestions to help me navigate life's challenges. I can highly recommend Wendy as a life coach."

Coaching Programs

Choose your path to growth

Two programs designed to meet you where you are. Join when you're ready. Stay as long as you like.

Program 01
$397
per month

Growth

For leaders who want steady progress without overwhelm.

—2 private coaching sessions per month (every other week)
—Focused, strategic conversations to tackle challenges and build momentum
—Action steps after each session to keep you on track
—Ideal for accountability and clarity while integrating change
Program 02
$597
per month

Evolve

For those ready to accelerate transformation and stay deeply supported.

—1 private coaching session every week
—Text support between sessions for real-time feedback and encouragement
—Deeper, faster breakthroughs through consistent weekly contact
—Perfect for big goals, rapid growth, or high-pressure leadership seasons

You can upgrade, downgrade, or pause at any time. Your journey, your pace.

Not sure which is right for you?
